input:
They were incredulous. Looking through the door, they said: “Here is Muhammad in his bed.” They then forced the door open and went in, only to receive the shock of their lives, as they realized that the man lying in bed was ʿAlī. They did not want to add to their problems by killing ʿAlī, so the cry was raised that Muhammad had escaped. Hurried meetings were held. Everyone concerned was alarmed. Abū Jahl took command of the situation. Several groups of horsemen were dispatched to chase Muhammad and his companion.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 14: The Journey to Madinah

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Chapter 14

characters.name: Abu Jahl ibn Hisham
characters.appearance: Late 50s, strong build, stern expression. Dark olive skin, thick black beard with subtle grey streaks. Wearing a dark brown woolen cloak with intricate silver brooch, black turban with short tail. Simple leather sandals. Distinguished by dark cloak and stern facial expression.

characters.name: ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib
characters.appearance: Mid 20s, light skin, lean build. Dark brown hair, young beard with reddish tint, neat and well-groomed. Wearing a simple white thobe, plain black woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Distinguished by young age and modest attire.

output.moral_lesson: Deception and betrayal can lead to chaos and confusion.
output.narrative_text: Abu Jahal and his men thought they had found Muhammad in his bed, but they were surprised to see Ali instead. They did not want to kill Ali, so they cried out that Muhammad had escaped. Meetings were held in a hurry, and Abu Jahal took charge of the situation.

compliance.notes: Scene depicts Abu Jahal and his men in a situation of deception and betrayal, without showing the Prophet or any violence. Ali is shown with a full face, but in a non-threatening manner.

output.image_prompt: Moody oil painting. Dark, narrow alleyway in 7th century Makkah. Abu Jahl, a middle-aged man with dark olive skin, thick black beard, and stern expression, stands at the entrance of a doorway. He is dressed in a dark brown woolen cloak with intricate silver brooch and a black turban with short tail. Behind him, two men can be seen looking into a room. Inside, a young Arab man with light skin, dark hair, and a young beard with reddish tint lies in bed, looking peaceful. Simple, dimly lit setting, with only a few clay pots and a woven mat visible. Low angle shot, focusing on Abu Jahl's stern expression. Dark, muted colors. No modern objects.
